creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
Created attachment 233616
Latin1 (ISO 8859/1) characters encoded in UTF-8

With UTF-8 now being the norm rather than the exception, remembering to use "iconv -f latin1 -t utf8 /usr/share/misc/latin1 | less" instead of "less /usr/share/misc/latin1" is becoming a minor pain point. Provide a version of it with UTF-8 encoding (attached with suggested name latin1.in-utf8) to ease that.
